title: The Districts (Extension to the Chittagong Hill-tracts) Ordinance, 1984
title_en: The Districts (Extension to the Chittagong Hill-tracts) Ordinance, 1984
description: An Ordinance to extend the Districts Act, 1836, to the Chittagong Hill-tracts. WHEREAS it is expedient to extend the Districts Act, 1836 (XXI of 1836), to the Chittagong Hill-tracts; NOW, THEREFORE, in pursuance of the Proclamation of the 24th March, 1982, and in exercise of all powers, enabling him in that behalf, the President is pleased to make and promulgate the following Ordinance:-

provisions.title: 1. Short title and commencement
provisions.content:
1. (1) This Ordinance may be called the Districts (Extension to the Chittagong Hill-tracts) Ordinance, 1984 .
(2) It shall be deemed to have come into force on the 18th April, 1981.

provisions.title: 2. Definition
provisions.content: 2. In this Ordinance, the expression “Chittagong Hill-tracts” means the area known by that name as existing on the first day of January, 1936.

provisions.title: 3. Application of Act XXI of 1836 to the Chittagong Hill-tracts
provisions.content: 3. The Districts Act, 1836 (XXI of 1836), shall apply to the Chittagong Hill-tracts.

provisions.title: 4. Validation
provisions.content: 4. The new districts of Bandarban and Khagrachari created in the Chittagong Hill-tracts under the Code of Criminal Procedure, 1898 (Act V of 1898), before the commencement of this Ordinance shall be deemed to have been created under the Districts Act, 1836 (XXI of 1836).

definitions.definition: the area known by that name as existing on the first day of January, 1936.
